certification: PRODUCTION golden path — full recovery loop over the public internet
environment: revivelabs.app (Vercel) + Render queue worker + customer receiver behind public HTTPS tunnel
walk: identity_verified (real Nango/Graph identity verify, lease gen 5)
resumed (signed callback delivered by the PRODUCTION worker, HMAC-verified + acked by revive.receiver)
delivery: prod queue -> Render worker drain -> signed recovery.resume_requested over the internet -> receiver ack -> case resumed, within one 6s poll
endpointRegistration: per-workspace encrypted config via POST /v1/workspace/resume-endpoint; signed /test event verified before the run
caveats: receiver hosted behind an ephemeral tunnel for the certification; a customer deployment is any public HTTPS endpoint
